title: Greek Lamb Skewers
description: Tender lamb skewers marinated in a classic Greek mixture of olive oil, lemon juice, and herbs. Perfect for a summer BBQ or outdoor gathering.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, olive oil, oregano, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
